description: Source-verified scholar/annotator notes for interpretive perspective popups. Keep empty until a claim has verifiable source/licensing metadata.

relationTypes.direct: The scholar/commentator directly comments on this passage.
relationTypes.methodology: The scholar's broader method is cautiously applied to this passage.
relationTypes.related: The scholar provides a related interpretive lens, not a direct comment.
relationTypes.background: The source provides historical/cultural background relevant to the passage.
